USD Model Repository

Below is a set of models that you are free to download and use within your renderings. Some are new, and some come from our nostalgic RenderMan Courseware series from many moons ago!

Model credits go to Michael Milano, Scott Eaton, Leif Pedersen, Dylan Sisson, Joshua Mills, Glen Johnson, Ruslan Safarov, Fabio Sciedlarczyk & Eugene Riecansky.

Download away!
